jobs.title: Biotechnology Intern — Cell Biology
jobs.content:
Lab Genomics Inc. is looking for an enthusiastic Biotechnology Intern to join our Cell Biology team for Summer 2026.

Responsibilities include cell culture maintenance, PCR assay development, and data analysis. This is a paid undergraduate internship open to current juniors and seniors pursuing a Bachelor's in Biotechnology, Biology, or a related life science field.

  • Run qPCR and gel electrophoresis
  • Maintain mammalian cell lines
  • Assist with CRISPR editing experiments

jobs.title: Research Associate I — Genomics
jobs.content:
Entry-level Research Associate position in our Genomics department. New graduates (BS/BA in Biology, Biochemistry, or related field) are welcome to apply. 0-1 year of laboratory experience preferred.

You will perform next-generation sequencing library preparation, data QC, and analysis using bioinformatics pipelines.

jobs.title: Senior Director, Corporate Development
jobs.content: Senior Director level role requiring 15+ years in corporate development, M&A, and strategic partnerships. MBA or advanced degree required. Only candidates with proven track record in biotech M&A should apply.

jobs.title: Bioinformatics Intern — Remote
jobs.content: Remote internship in bioinformatics. Undergraduate students pursuing degrees in Bioinformatics, Computer Science, or Biology are encouraged to apply. Work from anywhere in the US.

jobs.title: Clinical Research Intern — Hybrid
jobs.content: Hybrid internship (3 days on-site, 2 remote) in our Clinical Research team. Open to undergraduate students in Biology, Public Health, or Pre-Med programs.

jobs.title: Biochemistry Lab Intern & Research Assistant
jobs.content: Biochemistry lab internship and research assistant role. Candidates must understand enzyme kinetics and protein purification techniques.
